# Upstate Basketball League

> The official website of the Upstate Basketball League (UBL), a faith-based varsity basketball league serving smaller programs across Upstate New York.

## League summary

- Mission: Honor God through competition, build character, and unite communities on and off the court.
- Season: The 2026-27 league season is planned from December 2026 through February 2027.
- Divisions: Boys Varsity and Girls Varsity.
- Programs: The King's School, Perth, Wilton Baptist, HV Rocks, and HV Flames.
- Growth: One additional league program spot is currently open.
- Playoffs: Separate boys and girls brackets are planned for February 2027.
- Schedule status: Matchups, times, locations, and results are official only when confirmed by the league commissioner and published on the schedule.

## Official pages

- Home: https://upstatebasketballleague.com/
- Schedule and results: https://upstatebasketballleague.com/schedule.html
- Standings: https://upstatebasketballleague.com/standings.html
- Teams: https://upstatebasketballleague.com/teams.html
- Playoff brackets: https://upstatebasketballleague.com/bracket.html
- League standards: https://upstatebasketballleague.com/rules.html
- Gallery: https://upstatebasketballleague.com/gallery.html
- Sponsorships: https://upstatebasketballleague.com/sponsors.html
- About and leadership: https://upstatebasketballleague.com/about.html

## Contact

- General league inquiries: Info.upstatebasketballleague@gmail.com

Use the official pages above as the source of truth for UBL schedules, scores, standings, teams, policies, and announcements.
